name: Rony Denis
role: Leader, House of Prayer Christian Churches, Hinesville, Georgia
incident: On September 10, 2025, a federal court unsealed a 26-count indictment against eight members of the House of Prayer Christian Churches in Operation False Profit. Rony Denis and associates were charged with conspiracy to commit bank fraud, wire fraud, and filing false tax returns. The indictment alleged defendants fraudulently received VA education benefits intended for military veterans while enriching themselves at church members' expense.

name: Brady Boyd
role: Senior Pastor, New Life Church, Colorado Springs, Colorado
sourceLabel: Juicy Ecumenism / Institute on Religion and Democracy
incident: Brady Boyd, senior pastor of New Life Church in Colorado Springs, stepped down in June 2025 after court documents in the Robert Morris Gateway Church case revealed that Boyd had known of Morris's prior misconduct for years, including while Boyd was being interviewed by New Life Church in 2007. Church officials determined Boyd had shared inaccurate information with the congregation and was not fully trustworthy before the congregation.

name: Dillon Awes
role: Pastor, Stedfast Baptist Church, Watauga, Texas
incident: Pastor Dillon Awes of Stedfast Baptist Church, designated an anti-LGBT hate group by the Southern Poverty Law Center, delivered a sermon calling for gay people to be charged with crimes, convicted, sentenced to death, and shot in the back of the head. Awes has repeated this call in multiple documented sermons across multiple years. The church's lead pastor was subsequently revealed to have solicited prostitutes and engaged in gambling, forcing the church to split.
